title: Your Caring Heart ❤️
description: No matter how stubborn I become, you never stop caring. Whether it was during my fractured hand or on my toughest days, you were always there without expecting anything in return. Your kindness is one of the greatest gifts I've ever received.

title: The Peacemaker 🤝
description: Whenever we fight, you never let the silence last forever. Somehow, you're always the one who comes back with a smile and says, 'Okay bro... let's sort it out.' That simple habit has protected our bond more times than you can imagine.

title: Your Innocent Smile 😊
description: Whether you're posing at the temple, laughing during go-karting, or simply smiling in a random selfie, your smile has a way of making every ordinary moment feel extraordinary.

title: My Biggest Support 🌸
description: You have always supported me in ways you probably don't even realize. Sometimes with words, sometimes with actions, and sometimes just by being there. Knowing you're beside me has always given me strength.

title: Your Beautiful Heart 💖
description: People often notice someone's face first. But I hope the world notices your heart, because that's where your real beauty lives. Your compassion and sincerity are what truly make you special.

title: The Child Inside You 🧸
description: Even as we grow older, I hope you never lose that playful child who laughs loudly, enjoys silly moments, and finds happiness in the smallest things. That's one of my favourite versions of you.

title: Your Strength 💪
description: Life isn't always easy, but you've always found a way to move forward. You may not always realize it, but you're much stronger than you think, and I've always admired that quietly.

title: The Sister I Asked For 🌍
description: If someone gave me the chance to choose my sister all over again, I'd still choose you without thinking twice. Every memory, every fight, every laugh... they've made my life richer because you were a part of it.

title: Thank You for Existing 🌷
description: Sometimes I wonder how different my life would have been without you. Then I realize I don't even want to imagine it. Thank you for simply being my sister.

title: Forever My Favourite Person ❤️
description: Years from now we'll grow older, become busy, and life will change in many ways. But one thing I know will never change is this—you'll always be one of the most important people in my life.
